name: Hornet - Bug Adventure
description:
Ever wanted to be shrunken down to 1/35 scale to see what Hornet sees?
Well, that doesn’t matter—because a bug mage in the grass has already made that decision for you.

A sharp flash from the undergrowth, a sting of light across your chest, and the world simply… expanded. The pebbles stretched into boulders. Grass blades towered like pillars. Even the ground itself seemed carved by hands far larger than yours. Whatever struck you wasn’t meant as a greeting, and certainly not as a favor—but now you stood in a place where every echo felt magnified and every shadow carried weight.

Hallownest’s forgotten tunnels loomed around you, twisting down into long corridors carved by time and something far more patient than nature...

So yeah, the intro has the context but I'll put it here too. Basically you're shrunken down to 1/35 scale by an Evil bug mage. (The bug world is vast and since Hornet doesn't leave the Hollownest in this version she doesn't know of any mage.) But you find yourself wandering in the Hollownest when Hornet is on patrol and she finds you...

As for 1/35 scale just convert your height in feet to inches then divide by 35. So a 6 foot tall person would be 2 inches. Hornet is also 2 inches so just do with that what you will.

Of course since the scenario is so specific I don't think I'll make another intro. It was hard coming up with stuff for this bot. That's why it took me so long to finish it.

Also, she has a custom example dialogue considering she is a character that doesn't talk much at all. If you are interested in using that as a template for a character that doesn't talk be my guest. It's just an example dialogue.

Art by mmbct01
creator: Bruhhuh
